description: Legal document concerning an inheritance. Location: Fustat. Dated: first third of Iyyar, 1414 Seleucid, which is 1103 CE. Labwa b. Efrayim known as Ibn al-Malaṭī (אלמלטי) and her paternal uncle ʿEli, each of whom had been willed one-half of Efrayim's estate agree to be satisfied with the assets held by each side and to release each other from any further claims. No signatures. The facts are told in six lines; the remaining thirty-seven lines are legal verbiage. (Information from Goitein’s index card)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעניין ירושה; פוסטאט; תחילת אייר 1414 לספירת השטרות (1103 לספירה); לבוה בת אפרים ודודה עלי מסכימים לחלוקת עיזבון אפרים ומשחררים זה את זה מתביעות
